name: OxyGenX Pod Set – HYDRATE POD
shortDescription: Intensive hydrating OxyGenX pod set for dry, dull skin. 6 capsules + 6 primer gels + 6 serums. Hydration and skin renewal.
description:
The HYDRATE POD set is an intensive hydrating treatment package developed for the OxyGenX+ treatment device, designed for dry, dull, dehydrated skin.

The set contains 6 OxyGenX capsules (pods), 6 primer gels, and 6 serums – sufficient for 6 complete treatments.

During the treatment, the released CO₂ stimulates the skin's natural oxygen production (Bohr effect), while the special active ingredients intensively hydrate and replenish the skin, restoring its radiance.
metaTitle: OxyGenX HYDRATE POD set – intensive hydrating treatment package
metaDescription: HYDRATE POD set for OxyGenX+ device: 6 capsules + 6 primer gels + 6 serums. For dry, dull skin, intensive hydration. 12.990 Ft.

faq.question: How many treatments does a HYDRATE POD set last?
faq.answer: One set is sufficient for 6 complete treatments. It contains 6 capsules, 6 primer gels, and 6 serums.

faq.question: What skin type is the HYDRATE POD recommended for?
faq.answer: The HYDRATE POD is primarily recommended for dry, dull, dehydrated skin. It intensively hydrates and replenishes the skin, restoring its radiance and vitality.

faq.question: Which device is the HYDRATE POD set compatible with?
faq.answer: The HYDRATE POD set is designed for the OxyGenX+ device's oxy-pod applicator. It is also compatible with the HydraScan PRO+ 2026 oxy-pod applicator.
